response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tooling (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and a proven track record of technical leadership and open-source contributions, but lacks explicit evidence of people management experience beyond informal mentorship and workshops, and has no clear mobile platform or organizational change leadership history, which are preferred qualifications.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven technical leadership through open-source projects and workshop facilitation
Broad technical stack spanning mobile, web, and systems-level languages (TypeScript, DLang, Swift)
concerns: No clear documented experience in formal people management or team leadership roles
Lacks explicit mobile-platform ecosystem experience despite relevant tech exposure
No evidence of leading organizational change or strategic roadmap ownership beyond individual projects
